name: Police Clearance Certificate (PCC)
description: Issued to passport holders seeking employment, long-term visa, or residency abroad, certifying no criminal record.
estimated_processing_time: 1 day (if no verification needed) to 21 days
application_steps: Register/login on the Passport Seva Portal.
Fill the form, pay the fee, and book a PSK appointment.
Visit the PSK with original passport and address proofs.
If physical police verification is triggered, wait for the police visit/call.
Collect or receive the PCC once the police report is cleared.

required_documents.name: Purpose Proof
required_documents.purpose: To justify the need for the PCC.
required_documents.where_to_get: Employer offer letter, Visa application, Sponsorship letter

common_mistakes: Current address differs from passport address but no new address proof is provided.
Applying for PCC for a tourist visa (not required).
